warnings: Dropped 1 non-scored row(s) worth 0 points (Penalty Points (Dress Code and/or Late Arrival)). Check they really aren't scored.
_review.note: Machine-parsed from the official rating sheet. plan.md F3: nobody may be graded against this until a human confirms it.
_review.paraphrase_note: Descriptions and level descriptors are restated in our own words (plan.md §20). Criterion names and every point value are exactly as published on the official rating sheet.

criteria.name: Demonstrates understanding of the role play and defines problem(s) to be solved
criteria.description: Shows comprehension of the simulated scenario and clearly states the issue(s) that need resolution.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The participant offers neither an overview of the role play nor any identified problems.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant either explains the role play scenario or outlines the problem(s), but not both.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant both explains the role play scenario and clearly outlines the problem(s).

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant displays a deep understanding of the role play scenario and precisely articulates the problem(s).

criteria.name: Identifies alternatives and the pro(s) and con(s) of each
criteria.description: Presents various options and analyzes the advantages and disadvantages associated with each one.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No different approaches or solutions are suggested.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or more alternative options are presented, but their benefits or drawbacks are not examined.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A minimum of two alternative options are provided, along with an analysis of their respective benefits and drawbacks.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Several alternative options are presented, each with a thorough analysis of multiple advantages and disadvantages.

criteria.name: Identifies logical solution and aspects of implementation
criteria.description: Pinpoints a sensible solution and details how it would be put into practice.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No course of action or resolution is proposed.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: A solution is offered, but there is no detailed strategy for how it will be carried out.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A reasonable solution is presented, accompanied by a well-structured plan for its execution.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: A practical solution is developed with a comprehensive implementation plan that also specifies the required resources.

criteria.name: Demonstrates knowledge and understanding of the event knowledge areas: Systems Design and Analysis/ Object Oriented Programming Concepts/ Data and Information Management/ IT Project Management/ IT Infrastructure/ Emerging Business Technologies
criteria.description: Exhibits comprehension and familiarity with the specified knowledge domains for the event: Systems Design and Analysis, Object-Oriented Programming Concepts, Data and Information Management, IT Project Management, IT Infrastructure, and Emerging Business Technologies.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No understanding of any of the specified knowledge areas is shown.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Understanding is demonstrated for one or two of the specified knowledge areas.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Understanding is demonstrated for three of the specified knowledge areas.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Understanding is demonstrated for four or more of the specified knowledge areas.

criteria.name: Statements are well-organized and clearly stated
criteria.description: The communication is structured logically and articulated with clarity.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) did not appear ready or organized.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) were prepared, but the presentation lacked a coherent or logical flow.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation progressed in a clear and logical order.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation progressed in a clear and logical order, and all statements were well-structured.

criteria.name: Consistently displays confidence, poised body language, engaging eye contact, and effective voice projection.
criteria.description: Consistently exhibits self-assurance, composed physical demeanor, engaging visual connection, and effective vocal delivery.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: None of the listed presentation skills were evident.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or two of the listed presentation skills (self-assurance, body language, eye contact, or voice projection) were demonstrated.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Three of the listed presentation skills (self-assurance, body language, eye contact, or voice projection) were demonstrated.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: All listed presentation skills were demonstrated, significantly enhancing the overall delivery.

criteria.name: Demonstrates the ability to effectively answer questions
criteria.description: Shows the capacity to provide thorough and accurate responses to inquiries.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The participant was unable to respond to questions.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Responses to questions were incomplete.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Responses to questions were comprehensive.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant engaged with the judges while providing comprehensive answers to questions.
